description: Probabilistic risk = Exploitability x Impact x Reachability_eff x Asset x Blast, each factor normalized to a principled range. Replaces additive point heuristics. Decision thresholds are provisional and intended to be re-derived from the benchmark operating curve (Phase 3).

exploitability._doc: Noisy-OR fusion of INDEPENDENT exploit signals so that a missing signal never zeros risk: E = 1 - (1-EPSS)(1-KEV*kev_probability)(1-exploit_evidence)(1-cvss_prior). The CVSS-vector prior is always available and prevents an absent EPSS score from collapsing a genuinely exploitable CVE to zero.

impact._doc: CVSS environmental impact in [0,1]. Uses parsed CIA components when present (none=0, low=0.5, high=1.0), else falls back to cvss_base/10.

reachability._doc: R in [0,1] from call-graph evidence. Confirmed path: R = resolution_confidence * exp(-lambda*(hops-1)) * (1+taint_boost). No path: low prior carried with low confidence. max_call_hops bounds graph reachability search depth (entry-point -> sink) and is shared by Neo4j Cypher and the in-memory BFS so both agree.

blast._doc: Bounded amplifier B in [1, 1+beta] from impacted-service saturation (graph centrality replaces this in Phase 5). B = 1 + beta*(1 - exp(-rate*impacted_services)).

asset._doc: Asset criticality multiplier in [min,max]. Default 1.0 until an asset inventory is wired.

confidence._doc: Epistemic confidence Phi in [0,1] = geometric mean of evidence confidences. Reachability_eff = Phi*R + (1-Phi)*no_path_prior.

thresholds._doc: Provisional decision cut points on the 0-100 calibrated score. Re-derive from the benchmark precision/recall curve.
